eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 10:22 AM on JUL 19, 2026 Effective until 2:22 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildfire Alert - Jackson County Sheriff's Office has downgraded JAC-127-A to a Level 2 BE Set to evacuate. This is along Hwy 227 north to Taylor Rd, and Hwy 62 east to River Heights Rd due to Evans Creek Rd Fire. Continue to monitor local government channels for evacuation and incident updates
